# Support

Thank you for using **Safron CRM**.

This document explains how to get support, report issues, request features, and access commercial services provided by **Horsemen Technologies (Pty) Ltd**.

---

# Community Support

Community support is available through GitHub.

## Report a Bug

If you discover a bug, please create a GitHub Issue and include:

* Safron CRM version
* Operating System
* Browser (if applicable)
* Node.js version
* Database (MySQL/PostgreSQL)
* Docker version (if applicable)
* Steps to reproduce
* Expected behaviour
* Actual behaviour
* Screenshots or logs

Please search existing issues before creating a new one.

---

## Feature Requests

We welcome feature requests and enhancement ideas.

When opening a feature request, please include:

* Business problem
* Proposed solution
* Alternative solutions considered
* Expected benefits
* Mock-ups or screenshots (if available)

---

## Questions & Discussions

For general questions, implementation advice, or best practices, please use the GitHub Discussions section.

---

# Commercial Support

Organizations requiring guaranteed assistance may purchase commercial support from Horsemen Technologies.

Commercial support includes:

* Installation assistance
* Deployment support
* Docker and Kubernetes deployments
* Infrastructure architecture
* Performance optimization
* Security hardening
* Database migrations
* Disaster recovery planning
* Custom feature development
* API integrations
* User training
* Production troubleshooting

---

# Enterprise Services

Enterprise customers can request:

* Priority support
* Dedicated technical consultant
* SLA-backed response times
* Custom integrations
* White-label deployments
* On-premise deployment assistance
* Cloud deployment assistance
* Data migration services
* Security assessments
* Custom reporting
* Business process automation

---

# Support Hours

**Standard Business Hours**

Monday – Friday

08:00 – 17:00 (SAST)

Public holidays excluded unless covered by an active support agreement.

---

# Response Targets

| Priority | Initial Response |
| -------- | ---------------: |
| Critical | 2 Business Hours |
| High     | 4 Business Hours |
| Medium   |   1 Business Day |
| Low      |  2 Business Days |

Actual resolution times depend on issue complexity and support agreement.

---

# Security Issues

Please **do not** report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Instead, contact:

**Email:** [security@horsementech.com](mailto:security@horsementech.com)

See the project's **SECURITY.md** for the responsible disclosure process.

---

# Version Support

Only the latest stable release and supported Long-Term Support (LTS) versions receive bug fixes and security updates.

Older versions may require an upgrade before support can be provided.

---

# Before Contacting Support

Please have the following information available:

* Safron CRM version
* Node.js version
* Database version
* Operating System
* Docker version (if applicable)
* Browser version
* Relevant logs
* Screenshots
* Steps to reproduce the issue

Providing this information helps us diagnose and resolve issues more efficiently.

---

Thank you for choosing **Safron CRM**.
We appreciate your trust in Horsemen Technologies and are committed to delivering reliable, secure, and enterprise-grade software.
